scope: focused runtime uBLK qid/tag completion lifecycle trace consumed by the started-export live service-loop claim, with one hardware queue, queue depth 2, and five completed requests through read, write, flush, discard, and write-zeroes transitions
residual_risk: This runtime artifact does not cover fio workload breadth, mkfs or mount acceptance, online resize, crash durability, production block-device readiness, broader uBLK ABI behavior, or multi-queue scaling.
